finding_results.notes: Inserted three distributed Ina-internal beats (somatic tension, tactical self-correction, and consequence memory) across the meeting exchange so the passage no longer runs as external-only briefing dialogue.
Replaced repeated mouth/jaw tightening reactions with varied embodied cues (hard breath/face drag and tool-case grip/latch click), leaving a single mouth-twist reaction in the dock beat.

summary: Applied targeted prose/copyedit revisions to chapter 11: restored close-third interior cadence in the meeting sequence and removed repeated facial-microreaction tics in the dock confrontation while preserving scene pressure, character voice, and unsanitized consequence detail.
